level_signals: 10+ years of experience in enterprise software sales or account management
Leads a team of 5-10 Growth Account Executives
OTE range $360K-$435K consistent with senior sales management

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years of experience in enterprise software sales or account management, with 3+ years leading sales teams
Proven track record of consistently exceeding team revenue targets and developing high-performing account executives
Strong understanding of the startup ecosystem and experience working with high-growth technology companies
Deep expertise in strategic account planning and scaling account management processes in a fast-paced environment
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills with a data-driven approach to decision making
Excellence in cross-functional collaboration and stakeholder management
Demonstrated ability to coach and develop talent while maintaining high performance standards
Minimum education: Bachelor's degree or an equivalent combination of education, training, and/or experience

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Background in technical product sales, particularly in areas like APIs, infrastructure, or ML/AI solutions

scope.surface: AI-native startup customer segment – expansion and retention
core_responsibilities: Lead, coach, and develop a team of 5-10 Startup Growth AEs, providing regular feedback and guidance to drive both individual and team performance
Own team revenue targets, developing strategies to accelerate growth
Build scalable frameworks and processes for deal negotiations, account planning, quarterly business reviews, and customer health monitoring
Partner with Product, Marketing, and other GTM teams to identify and execute on strategic growth opportunities across the startup portfolio
Regularly review customer health metrics and collaborate with team members to develop action plans for at-risk accounts
Mentor team members in developing consultative sales skills, negotiation best practices, and technical understanding of AI applications
Drive operational excellence through pipeline management, forecasting accuracy, and team productivity metrics
Participate in strategic customer conversations and support Growth AEs in complex negotiations

green_flags: OTE compensation range disclosed and competitive ($360K-$435K)
Visa sponsorship explicitly offered with immigration lawyer support
Clear team ownership scope (5-10 AEs, fastest-growing AI-native startups)
Anthropic is a well-funded, high-profile AI safety company with strong market position
red_flags: Hybrid policy requires at least 25% office time in San Francisco — eliminates fully-remote candidates
OTE range is wide ($75K spread) with no base/commission split disclosed, making total compensation structure unclear

Role title and most qualifications are listed under 'You may be a good fit if you have' — phrasing is soft but qualifications appear expected at this seniority level; ambiguity in hard vs soft classification
